#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GetUserHandler, global::TestNamespace.GetUserHandler>();
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>));
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<,>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>));
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Consumer, global::TestNamespace.Consumer>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>, global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
